title: Reason Hepatitis B test not conducted ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for Reason Hepatitis B test not conducted ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.
